evals.prompt: clone 已經過第一輪 fidelity pass，現在我要做 Phase 2 品牌變體。請先幫我規劃視覺方向、AI 圖像 role 和 copy delta。
evals.expected_output: Should treat this as a Phase 2 brand variation task. It should preserve the protected fidelity boundary while producing variation direction, image role planning, and copy delta guidance.
assertions: Treats the task as Phase 2 brand variation
Plans visual direction and image roles

evals.prompt: 我還沒有把 clone 做穩，但我現在就想直接做品牌差異化。
evals.expected_output: Should recognize the fidelity boundary is not stable enough for brand variation. It should route the task back to reference-clone-architect instead of mixing Phase 1 truth capture with Phase 2 differentiation.
assertions: Recognizes fidelity is not stable yet

evals.prompt: 我們想保留原本 block hierarchy，但把視覺感受做得更像 RallyTech 自己的品牌。也請一起寫 acceptance note。
evals.expected_output: Should keep hierarchy intact while proposing a differentiated visual direction and an acceptance note that defines what changed and what stayed protected. It should not let the variation drift into structural redesign.
